rationale: DeSarbo and Wu (2001) is cited at a specific methodological decision point, not just as general background. The citing authors explicitly say they considered a hybrid model with a perceptual-mapping/geometric component based on that work and then tested it. They report that this component was not empirically supported in their data, so the citation meaningfully informs model specification and boundary setting even though it is not central to the final retained model.
relation_description: The citing paper uses DeSarbo and Wu (2001) as a methodological reference for a perceptual-mapping component in a hybrid similarity model. After testing, the authors drop that component and proceed with a feature-based model only.
